theater_description: One-month Eastern Ghouta window following UNSC Resolution 2401, aligned to the SNHR monthly fatality total.
civilian_area_note: Civilian exposure proxied by a contemporaneous trapped-population figure of roughly 400,000 civilians.
split_reason: Keeps the existing Ghouta family row narrow and aligned to the clearest retained monthly death total.
quality_note: Good civilian and child death totals with a contemporaneous population proxy, but no actor-complete or combatant-complete system.

theater_description: Spring-summer 2019 escalation window aligned to the late-April through late-July civilian death total.
civilian_area_note: Civilian exposure proxied by the reported trapped civilian population of roughly 3 million in Idlib/northwest Syria.
split_reason: Retains the core Idlib family row without widening to a full nationwide chronology.
quality_note: Useful civilian total with explicit Syrian-government/Russian offensive context, but combatant coverage and denominator stability remain weak.
